# Build results
bin/
obj/
out/
build/

# Visual Studio files
.vs/
*.user
*.suo
*.userosscache
*.sln.docstates

# VS Code files
.vscode/

# Rider
.idea/

# ASP.NET Scaffolding
ScaffoldingReadMe.txt

# Logs
*.log

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# IIS Express
.vs/
iisexpress/

# Test results
TestResults/

# NuGet
*.nupkg
packages/
!packages/build/

# Publish output
publish/
*.publishsettings

# Entity Framework
*.edmx.diagram

# Temporary files
*.tmp
*.temp

# Node modules (if frontend tools used)
node_modules/

# Environment files
.env

# Coverage reports
coverage/

# Resharper
_ReSharper*/
*.DotSettings.user
